command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2qNhRDYaxzneXfG.9d70d45e7b6d --database KXbJ95iGQTQDrViqhuR8ny --execute 
-- Create post_type enum if not exists
DO $$ BEGIN
  CREATE TYPE post_type AS ENUM ('image', 'video', 'text', 'carousel', 'story', 'reel', 'link');
EXCEPTION WHEN duplicate_object THEN NULL;
END $$;

-- Add missing columns to posts table
ALTER TABLE posts
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS post_type post_type DEFAULT 'text',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS likes BIGINT DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS comments BIGINT DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS shares BIGINT DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS reach BIGINT DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS impressions BIGINT DEFAULT 0;
